failure.message:
1. Test Case ID: Aqi3Du
- Undocumented HTTP status code
Received: 400 Documented: 200
[400] Bad Request:
`{"type":"https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc9110#section-15.5.1","title":"One or more validation errors occurred.","status":400,"errors":{"RequestContext.TenantId":["The TenantId field is required."],"RequestContext.UserType":["The UserType field is required."],"RequestContext.ActorUserId":["The ActorUserId field is required."],"RequestContext.AffiliateId":["The AffiliateId field is required."]},"traceId":"00-dd373d29b422f37c40a6765a10a61344-5e74d14ede8602fa-00"}`
Reproduce with:
curl -X POST -H 'Content-Type: application/*+json' -d '{"requestContext": {}, "x-schemathesis-unknown-property": 42}' http://167.172.49.177:8080/api/v1/Batches/e3e70682-c209-1cac-a29f-6fbed82c07cd/submit

1. Test Case ID: UEkIeY
- API rejected schema-compliant request
Valid data should have been accepted Expected: 2xx, 401, 403, 404, 409, 5xx
[400] Bad Request:
`{"type":"https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc9110#section-15.5.1","title":"One or more validation errors occurred.","status":400,"errors":{"RequestContext":["The RequestContext field is required."]},"traceId":"00-1dfb0b83d6b36abd6bc791b877635dea-0070c940ac7c1d37-00"}`
Reproduce with:
curl -X POST -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{}' http://167.172.49.177:8080/api/v1/Batches/e3e70682-c209-1cac-a29f-6fbed82c07cd/submit

1. Test Case ID: Tb340V
- Undocumented HTTP status code
Received: 400 Documented: 200
[400] Bad Request:
`{"type":"https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc9110#section-15.5.1","title":"One or more validation errors occurred.","status":400,"errors":{"RequestContext.TenantId":["The TenantId field is required."],"RequestContext.UserType":["The UserType field is required."],"RequestContext.ActorUserId":["The ActorUserId field is required."],"RequestContext.AffiliateId":["The AffiliateId field is required."]},"traceId":"00-e4dc2fdd22abb29420f33b00a8463f54-eef5d06636055b89-00"}`
Reproduce with:
curl -X POST -H 'Content-Type: application/*+json' -d '{"requestContext": {}, "x-schemathesis-unknown-property": 42}' http://167.172.49.177:8080/api/v1/Batches/e3e70682-c209-1cac-a29f-6fbed82c07cd/validate

1. Test Case ID: J02tCg
- API rejected schema-compliant request
Valid data should have been accepted Expected: 2xx, 401, 403, 404, 409, 5xx
[400] Bad Request:
`{"type":"https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc9110#section-15.5.1","title":"One or more validation errors occurred.","status":400,"errors":{"RequestContext":["The RequestContext field is required."]},"traceId":"00-81744535efc16483e317302b77d67713-c2422b17e6980afa-00"}`
Reproduce with:
curl -X POST -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{}' http://167.172.49.177:8080/api/v1/Batches/e3e70682-c209-1cac-a29f-6fbed82c07cd/validate

1. Test Case ID: iWHqLF
- Undocumented HTTP status code
Received: 400 Documented: 200
[400] Bad Request:
`{"type":"https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc9110#section-15.5.1","title":"One or more validation errors occurred.","status":400,"errors":{"ProductId":["The ProductId field is required."],"File.FileName":["The FileName field is required."],"File.FileBase64":["The FileBase64 field is required."],"File.ContentType":["The ContentType field is required."],"RequestContext.TenantId":["The TenantId field is required."],"RequestContext.UserType":["The UserType field is required."],"RequestContext.ActorUserId":["The Acto // Output truncated...`
Reproduce with:
curl -X POST -H 'Content-Type: application/*+json' -d '{"file": {}, "productId": null, "requestContext": {}, "x-schemathesis-unknown-property": 42}' http://167.172.49.177:8080/api/v1/Batches/card-creation/upload

1. Test Case ID: GRZhOL
- API rejected schema-compliant request
Valid data should have been accepted Expected: 2xx, 401, 403, 404, 409, 5xx
[400] Bad Request:
`{"type":"https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc9110#section-15.5.1","title":"One or more validation errors occurred.","status":400,"errors":{"File":["The File field is required."],"ProductId":["The ProductId field is required."],"RequestContext":["The RequestContext field is required."]},"traceId":"00-072ab5e5885a156ef1dfc7d5fa4295d5-6f7e7efe6ce539f8-00"}`
Reproduce with:
curl -X POST -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{}' http://167.172.49.177:8080/api/v1/Batches/card-creation/upload

1. Test Case ID: LeS9Lz
- Undocumented HTTP status code
Received: 400 Documented: 200
[400] Bad Request:
`{"type":"https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc9110#section-15.5.1","title":"One or more validation errors occurred.","status":400,"errors":{"batchId":["The value '0' is not valid."]},"traceId":"00-e68624db9e5bbac208d7987c0daac547-fb94a0f48417e425-00"}`
Reproduce with:
curl -X GET http://167.172.49.177:8080/api/v1/Batches/0/results/download

1. Test Case ID: 8eUi55
- API rejected schema-compliant request
Valid data should have been accepted Expected: 2xx, 401, 403, 404, 409, 5xx
- Undocumented HTTP status code
Received: 400 Documented: 200
[400] Bad Request:
`{"type":"https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc9110#section-15.5.1","title":"One or more validation errors occurred.","status":400,"errors":{"Page":["The field Page must be between 1 and 2147483647."],"PageSize":["The field PageSize must be between 1 and 100."]},"traceId":"00-08950eb7705388d4cda39bd84fea8e0a-019e9a070ad6ee47-00"}`
Reproduce with:
curl -X GET 'http://167.172.49.177:8080/api/v1/Batches/e3e70682-c209-1cac-a29f-6fbed82c07cd/rows?Page=0&PageSize=0'

1. Test Case ID: 2XOVUO
- Undocumented HTTP status code
Received: 400 Documented: 200
[400] Bad Request:
`{"type":"https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc9110#section-15.5.1","title":"One or more validation errors occurred.","status":400,"errors":{"batchId":["The value '0' is not valid."]},"traceId":"00-546edb23058208537a4f666c6e205da1-d16736f86cc3cde0-00"}`
Reproduce with:
curl -X GET http://167.172.49.177:8080/api/v1/Batches/0
